name: livesaferust-vscode-prototype
description: Prototype editor diagnostics for LiveSafeRust Rust taint flows.

livesaferust.debounceMs.description: Delay after edits before recomputing diagnostics.

livesaferust.backend.description: Diagnostic backend. saf-backed follows the paper pipeline on save/rescan; source-sidecar is a fast local fallback.

livesaferust.safImage.description: SAF Docker image/toolchain path used by the SAF-backed backend.

livesaferust.ensureSafSdk.description: Pass --ensure-saf-sdk to run_saf.py before SAF-backed scans. Useful for fresh Docker images, but slower.

livesaferust.rustToolchain.description: Optional rustup toolchain passed to run_saf.py, for example 1.95.0.

livesaferust.runSafOnOpen.description: Run the SAF-backed backend when a Rust file is opened. Disabled by default because SAF may invoke Docker.
